creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
ports following has dependency for libgcrypt.
library version numbers need to be updated.
  emulators/fuse
  emulators/libspectrum
  games/libggz
  graphics/telak
  mail/wmbiff
  misc/metalink-tools
  multimedia/vlc-devel
  net-im/mcabber
  net/csync2
  net/cyphesis
  net/wireshark
  security/dirmngr
  security/fiked
  security/gnome-keyring
  security/gnupg
  security/gnutls
  security/gsasl
  security/opencdk
  security/openvas-libnasl
  security/p5-Crypt-GCrypt
  security/pinentry
  security/seccure
  security/vpnc
  sysutils/fusefs-cryptofs
  textproc/libxslt

ports following also depend on libgcrypt
but no library version number is specified.
  net-im/climm
  security/libotr
  security/pidgin-otr
  sysutils/freeipmi

-- 
end

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  umq@ueo.co.jp
